title: Automate M365 to Google Workspace Migrations with ADK multi-agents
summary: Google Cloud Tech demonstrates building multi-agent systems for enterprise migrations using the Agent Development Kit (ADK). The system automates Microsoft 365 to Google Workspace assessment and licensing mapping through agents focused on input parsing, research, and reporting, with self-correcting loops, context caching, and direct production deployment.
